head: dense_fg_aux
hypothesis: P6: Soft dense targets probe. Gaussian blur (sigma=1.0) on real PNG masks softens boundary edges from hard 0/1 to ~3px transition zone at 28×28. Hypothesis: hard boundaries create artificial edge artifacts propagating through FPN, harming bbox precision. Soft targets reduce boundary artifacts. Single variable vs E-45 (hard targets). Success: pf_mIoU +0.005+, reduced n_pred_too_small/large. No-go: pf_mIoU drop >0.01.
